phrases.english: I have a playful cat named Leo.
phrases.context: Use this to introduce your pet cat.

phrases.english: My neighbor owns a very energetic dog.
phrases.context: Talk about a friend's or neighbor's dog.

phrases.english: I saw a beautiful bird in the garden.
phrases.context: Mention an animal you observed in nature.

phrases.english: The children love to feed the ducks at the park.
phrases.arabic: يحب الأطفال إطعام البط في الحديقة.
phrases.pronunciation: Yuhibbul atfal it'aam al-batt fil hadiqah.
phrases.context: Describe a common activity involving animals.

phrases.english: Be careful, there are many bees around the flowers.
phrases.arabic: كن حذرًا، هناك الكثير من النحل حول الزهور.
phrases.pronunciation: Kun hadhiran, hunaaka al-katheer min an-nahli hawl az-zuhour.
phrases.context: Warn someone about the presence of insects.
